issues.title: Openai API without authentication
issues.body:
Please, add a possibility to set a null api key thus omitting authorization header from the request entirely. Use case: free public apis with no api key requirement. In case if api key is present, the request to such a service might fail with 401. Example: jina AI

Might be helpful with the local resources as well

Maybe there was a regression, like #2206 states, not sure.

comments.body: Thank you, that did help. I was wondering if that was possible as well.

Oh, you are right. I probably missed the commentaries for it because when I looked at it for the first time, I thought that it wouldn't work since that implementation returns an empty string, which didn't work in the first place. This is also did helped
